title: Converting SQL Server types and rules to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini to convert SQL Server database schemas and code to PostgreSQL equivalents. Gemini serves as an AI tutor that not only translates code constructs like user-defined types to PostgreSQL DOMAINs but also explains the conversion process to help developers build PostgreSQL expertise.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates using Gemini to convert SQL Server database schemas and code into PostgreSQL equivalents. The walkthrough covers translating constructs such as user-defined types into PostgreSQL DOMAINs, with Gemini explaining each conversion rather than only emitting code. It positions the model as a tutor for schema conversion, aimed at helping developers build PostgreSQL expertise during a migration.
